title: eresimus stellatus
side_effects: Eresimus stellatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, while prolonged exposure may lead to kidney damage or liver failure. It can also trigger an allergic response in some individuals, manifesting as hives, itching, and swelling of the face, lips, and tongue. In severe cases, improper use of eresimus stellatus can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening condition requiring immediate medical attention.
